## Properties

### id


<Code>{`id: 'date-widget'`}</Code>


### use


<Code>{`use: (node) => {
        if (node.schema.type !== 'string') {
            return false;
        }

        if (node.schema.format === 'time') {
            return true;
        }

        return node.schema.format === 'date' || node.schema.format === 'date-time';
    }`}</Code>


### DateWidget


<Code>{`Widget: DateWidget`}</Code>
